title: Cascade Layers Boss
description: Boss challenge: Master CSS @layer to organize styles into a priority system where component styles override resets, and utilities override everything
html:
Layered Styles

This component uses CSS cascade layers for organized, predictable styling.
starterCss:
/* Organize styles using @layer:
   Layer order: reset, base, components, utilities
   - Reset layer: remove default margins/padding on h2 and p
   - Base layer: set body font, default text color
   - Components layer: style the card with border, padding, rounded corners
   - Utilities layer: .text-uppercase forces uppercase text
   The layer order determines priority (later = higher priority) */

validationRules.message: Heading should use the primary color (#007bff)
Button should have a blue background
The .text-uppercase utility should apply text-transform: uppercase

hints.text: @layer establishes cascade ordering. Layers declared later win over earlier ones, regardless of specificity.
Declare order first: @layer reset, base, components, utilities; Then define each layer with @layer name { ... } blocks.
Declare layer order, then fill each layer with appropriate styles. Utilities layer wins over components.
